subject: A large luminous golden egg resting in a nest of dark twigs and leaves, surrounded by several smaller pale cream-white eggs
description: A single oversized golden egg sits at the center of a woven nest of dark twigs and broad green leaves, glowing with an internal warm light that bathes the surrounding cluster of smaller cream-colored eggs in soft amber. The nest is tucked into shadowy foliage, with deep green and near-black leaves crowding the edges of the frame. The composition is a still-life close-up — no figures, no creatures — placing the egg itself as the iconic subject. The lighting is concentrated and radiant, treating the golden egg as the only light source.
foreground: a large radiant golden egg cradled among smaller pale eggs in a twig nest
background: dark woven nest, shadowed twigs and dense green leaves
